message:
chore: ignore .beads/.br_history/ to prevent history snapshot accumulation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,6 +70,7 @@ diff.txt
 .beads/*.lock
 .beads/last-touched
 .beads/*.tmp
+.beads/.br_history/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
